calendar.matters:
HEARING ON PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, MATTEO VARGAS
Off Calendar Feb-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The matter came on for Change of name and gender of Petitioner Matteo Vargas.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: N. Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:04 am. and concluding at 10:08 am.

Petitioner Maria Jose Vargas appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

Petition for change of name filed September 24, 2024.

Order to show cause filed December 02, 2024.

Notice of hearing filed November 13, 2024.

The Court addresses the petitioner.

The Petitioner provides testimony.

After reviewing the petition, hearing the testimony and there are no objections filed, The Court grants Petitioner's request for change of name.

HEARING ON PETITION TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE MINOR, MATTEO VARGAS

Off Calendar Dec-20-2024 Off Calendar
